guardrails: no hidden subcontract claims without public evidence

confidence_grades.A: official structured data, procurement, finance, contracts, public datasets
confidence_grades.B: official narrative documents, local council, audit, government press releases
confidence_grades.C: news, public reviews, blogs, SNS-style public signals with cross-checking
confidence_grades.D: weak public trace or missing data; must be shown as unverified

primary_sources.name: 문화체육관광부 지역축제 자료
primary_sources.use: 2017-2026 regional festival official annual source discovery

primary_sources.name: 문화체육관광부_지역축제 정보
primary_sources.use: festival master fields: name, type, place, period, budget, visitors, organization where available

primary_sources.name: 한국관광 데이터랩 문화관광축제 분석
primary_sources.use: visitor trend, day-average visitors, spending, SNS keywords and sentiment-style signals

primary_sources.name: 조달청_나라장터 입찰공고정보서비스
primary_sources.use: festival/event agency bid notices, details, base amount, restrictions, change history

primary_sources.name: 행정안전부_지방재정365_계약현황
primary_sources.use: local contract method, contract name, date, amount, vendor from 2016 onward where available

primary_sources.name: 행정안전부_지방재정365_행사축제원가회계정보
primary_sources.use: event/festival cost, revenue, net cost, dates from 2012 onward where available

primary_sources.name: 행정안전부_지방재정365_행사·축제경비편성내역
primary_sources.use: event operation, compensation, subsidy, facility budget categories from 2015 onward where available

sample_cases.diagnosis: success/failure determination requires year-specific visitor, cost, contract, and issue evidence before asserting causality
sample_cases.reason: placeholder case used to demonstrate structure only

sample_cases.diagnosis: high-recognition festival candidate for performance and vendor-contract tracing
sample_cases.reason: requires official year-specific evidence before scoring

sample_cases.diagnosis: crowding/transport-sensitive mega-event candidate for cause tracing
sample_cases.reason: requires official and media evidence before scoring
